title: dryopteris gracilipes
intro: Dryopteris gracilipes, also known as the slender wood fern or slender wood fern, is a species of fern belonging to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Dryopteris gracilipes include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the fronds in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be taken orally for its medicinal benefits.
